# CSMP Gate (b) — Corporate-Action Adjustment Audit

*Generated by `scripts/csmp/audit_corporate_actions.py` — numbers are derived from the store and are reproducible on re-run.*

- **CA events:** 11,780  |  **Adjustment factors:** 1,011
- **Store:** 4,099 trade dates, 7,030,920 rows
- **Move screen:** single-day raw close-to-close moves <= -20% or >= 25% between consecutive **full** sessions (EQ+BE union, gap <= 5d). Both gold-ETF restricted sessions excluded.

## 1. Event Inventory

| Action type | Events | Symbols | Span |
|-------------|-------:|--------:|------|
| BONUS | 895 | 638 | 2000-07-03 .. 2026-07-10 |
| DIVIDEND | 10,771 | 2,400 | 2000-07-26 .. 2026-07-31 |
| SPLIT | 114 | 95 | 2010-03-22 .. 2026-07-03 |

Store EQ symbols: 3,891. Symbols with CA events: 2,427.

## 2. Factor Derivation

**Convention:** backward adjustment — post-event prices unchanged, pre-event prices scaled. Bonus: factor = E/(E+B). Split/sub-division: factor = new_FV/old_FV (FV 10->1 => 0.1). Special dividend: factor = (P-D)/P where D >= 20% of prior close P. No plain-float fallback exists — every factor is derived from source evidence (R1).

| Action type | Factors | Min factor | Max factor | Avg factor |
|-------------|--------:|-----------:|-----------:|-----------:|
| BONUS | 888 | 0.0125 | 0.993377 | 0.535891 |
| SPECIAL_DIVIDEND | 11 | 0.366197 | 0.787234 | 0.626625 |
| SPLIT | 112 | 0.01 | 0.5 | 0.311607 |

## 4. Adjusted Continuity

The adjusted `prev_close(t) ≈ close(t-1)` check now tests **ex-date rows** — the only rows where adjustment has an effect. Between ex-dates the identical cumulative factor scales both sides, so mismatches are impossible by construction (the trivial case). Each ex-date row tests whether the factor *closes* the raw gap (R8).

| Symbol | Ex-dates | Mismatches | Details |
|--------|---------:|-----------:|---------|
| RELIANCE | 3 | 2 | 2017-09-07: adj_before=411.35, adj_pc=822.70; 2024-10-28: adj_before=1327.85, adj_pc=2655.70 |
